confirmed_building.scope_note: Sample fixture models a confirmed target named in an official post-earthquake tag/status source.

document_inventory.description: Official LGU source reports red and yellow tag issuance for earthquake-affected buildings and defines tag effects.

physical_condition_public_evidence.description: The official source describes use restrictions tied to red and yellow tags.

unresolved_exceptions.description: The fixture preserves that an older tag/status source does not by itself establish the latest condition.
unresolved_exceptions.resolution_route: Request latest tag/status or lifting records from the issuing office.

manual_request_targets.target: Davao City Office of the Building Official
manual_request_targets.request: Ask for the latest tag/status and any follow-up inspection record for the confirmed target.
manual_request_targets.reason: A tag/status source must be dated and may need latest-status verification.

overclaim_boundary.allowed_conclusion: Official post-earthquake tag/status evidence was found and must be reported with date, target, issuing body, and unresolved latest-status exceptions.

query_log.query: site:davaocity.gov.ph earthquake red yellow tags buildings
query_log.result_summary: Official LGU post-earthquake tag/status source found.

packet_result.summary: Official post-earthquake tag/status evidence was found; the packet preserves unresolved latest-status exceptions.
